title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sasken Technologies Holdings Services:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies Holdings Services!
